import project1Local from "../assets/images/projects/project-1.jpg";
import project2Local from "../assets/images/projects/project-2.jpg";
import video from "../assets/images/video.mp4";

export const siteImages = {
  heroMain:
    "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
  heroApp:
    "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559028012-481c04fa702d?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
  heroCase:
    "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",

  featuredProject:
    "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556740749-887f6717d7e4?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1400&q=80",
  dashboardPreview:
    "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551288049-bebda4e38f71?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1400&q=80",

  project1:  video,
  project2: project2Local,
  project3:
    "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512941937669-90a1b58e7e9c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1400&q=80",
  project4:
    "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542744173-8e7e53415bb0?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1400&q=80",

  fallback: project1Local,
};
